precedent: Challenger long-form staged Living Cover transition
rail_text_policy: Viewer-facing text remains inside the fixed right rail.
visual_policy: Source art holds the previous chapter state for the first 120ms after the story boundary, then eases from previous to next state by 600ms.
hard_shift_policy: A hard source-art shift at 01:31/01:32 or any chapter boundary is not eligible for MP4 render.
